Dashboard activity for entrants to browse events and scan QR codes

DECLINED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Entrant.RegistrationRecord.Outcome
Entrant declined the invitation
declineEntrant(String) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.LotteryPool
Moves an entrant from the selected list to the declined list.
declineInvitation(String) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Entrant
Declines a lottery invitation for the given event.
deleteEntrant(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EntrantDB
Deletes an entrant document from Firestore by device ID.
deleteEvent(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EventDB
Deletes an event from Firestore.
deleteLotteryPool(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.LotteryDB
Deletes a lottery pool document from Firestore by event ID.

deleteOrganizer(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.OrganizerDB
Deletes an organizer document from Firestore by device ID.
DeleteProfileActivity - Class in com.example.cmput301_app

drawEntrants(List<String>) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.LotteryPool
Randomly selects up to drawSize entrants from the provided waiting list.
drawReplacement(List<String>) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.LotteryPool
Randomly selects one replacement entrant from the provided waiting list.
